  "findings": [
    "Severe, rapid metallic tapping/clacking noise at idle",
    "Irregular rhythm indicating slack in the timing chain or severe valvetrain clearance issues",
    "High risk of catastrophic engine failure due to potential timing jump"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Shut down the engine immediately to prevent catastrophic valve-to-piston contact",
    "Remove the valve cover and timing cover to inspect the timing chain tensioner, guides, and chain stretch",
    "Inspect camshaft lobes and lifters/bucket clearances"
  ],
  "rationale": "The audio recording reveals a highly pronounced, rapid, and metallic clacking/tapping sound that is characteristic of a severely loose timing chain slapping against its guides or a critical valvetrain clearance failure. Operating the engine in this state carries a critical risk of timing jump and catastrophic internal engine damage.",

    "OEM Service Manual - Engine Mechanical (Valvetrain & Timing Chain Diagnostics)"
  ]
